---
title: "Project 3"
author: "YOUR NAME"
date: "Updated November 23"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
        code_folding: hide
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
# Use this R-Chunk to load all your libraries!

devtools::install_github('byuidatascience/data4soils') # run this line once in console to get package
library(data4soils)
```

```{r load_data}
# Use this R-Chunk to import all your datasets!

Ng <- cfbp_fpjuliet$ng
```

## Background


## Focus on the Data

```{r}


```


## Focus on the Model

```{r, error=TRUE}


```


## Select and Use a Model
  
```{r}


```


## A Model is an Assumption

```{r}


```

## Conclusions

```{r}


```


## Reflection

```{r}


```
